title: More Ancient Debris!
description: Tweaks the world generation to generate around twice as much ancient debris as normal!
body:
**This mod tweaks the world generation to generate around twice as much ancient debris as normal!**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

[<center>![Discord Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/FVH3GaMHJz)
[![GitHub Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Github-Button-64.png)](https://github.com/T1taniumF0rge-Industries-Inc/More-Ancient-Debris-)
[![Modrinth Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/shader/more-ancient-debris-mod)
[![Ko-fi Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Kofi-Button-64.png)</center>](https://ko-fi.com/titan1um)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

ℹ️*This mod is a fork made from the* [More Ancient Debris Datapacks collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/O1gqlhtQ)!
# 📥Installation:
This mod tweaks the world generation to generate around twice as much (2x more) ancient debris as normal! The pack is *made for* **all versions and snapshots between 1.18.2 and 26.1.1**.

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# ✨Features:
Tweaks the world generation to generate around twice as much ancient debris as normal!

**If installed on server, this mod is *not needed* on the client! _(functions like a plugin)_**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 🛠️Versioning:
This ressource pack uses the following versioning system:
- **Base pack:** standard versioning 
  - -> *e.g.* **1.0, 2.4,...**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this datapack. Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_05.png)
